Description: Start with mobile layout and add complexity for larger screens
Do: Write mobile styles first, use min-width breakpoints
Don't: Don't write desktop styles first then override for mobile

Description: Use clamp() for fluid typography that scales between breakpoints
Do: Use text-[clamp(1rem,2.5vw,2rem)] for fluid sizing
Don't: Don't use fixed font sizes that jump at breakpoints

Description: Use proper HTML5 semantic elements
Do: Use <nav>, <main>, <article>, <section>, <aside>
Don't: Don't use divs for everything

Description: Ensure visible focus states for keyboard navigation
Do: Use focus:ring or focus:outline classes
Don't: Don't remove focus outlines without alternatives

Description: Add ARIA labels to interactive elements without text
Do: Use aria-label on icon buttons and custom components
Don't: Don't rely on visual-only labels

Description: Use Tailwind utilities directly in HTML
Do: Compose utilities in markup, extract with @apply only when needed
Don't: Don't create custom CSS classes when utilities exist
Code Good: '<button class="bg-blue-500 text-white px-4 py-2 rounded-lg hover:bg-blue-600 transition-colors">'
Code Bad: '<button class="my-btn"> /* custom class for simple styling */'

Description: Use Just-In-Time mode for smaller CSS bundles
Do: Enable JIT in Tailwind config for production
Don't: Don't use full Tailwind CSS in production

Description: Remove unused Tailwind classes from production CSS
Do: Configure purge/content paths in tailwind.config.js
Don't: Don't ship unused CSS to production

Description: Extract common patterns into reusable components
Do: Create component files, use @apply for repeated patterns
Don't: Don't repeat the same utility combinations everywhere
Code Bad: '<button class="bg-blue-500 text-white px-4 py-2 rounded-lg"> /* repeated */'

Description: Use Tailwind's @apply with variant classes
Do: Create components with variant props, use clsx for conditional classes
Don't: Don't hardcode every variant in every instance
Code Good: function Button({ variant = 'primary' }) { const base = 'px-4 py-2 rounded-lg'; const variants = { primary: 'bg-blue-500 text-white'
Docs URL: '<button class="bg-blue-500 text-white px-4 py-2 rounded-lg"> ... <button class="bg-gray-200 text-gray-800 px-4 py-2 rounded-lg">'

Description: Use Tailwind's dark: modifier for dark mode
Do: Add dark: variants to all color utilities
Don't: Don't create separate dark mode CSS files

Description: Use Tailwind transition utilities for smooth state changes
Do: Add transition-all or specific transition utilities
Don't: Don't change styles instantly without transitions

Description: Use container class for consistent max-width
Do: Apply container class with mx-auto for centering
Don't: Don't use arbitrary max-width values
Code Bad: '<div class="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4"> /* duplicate with container */'

Description: Use CSS Grid with Tailwind's grid utilities
Do: Apply grid grid-cols-{} gap-{} for layouts
Don't: Don't use flexbox for 2D layouts
Code Bad: '<div class="flex flex-wrap gap-6"> /* for grid layout */'

Description: Use Tailwind's form utilities for consistent inputs
Do: Apply ring, border, focus:ring for form states
Don't: Don't use default browser form styles
Code Good: '<input class="w-full px-3 py-2 border border-gray-300 rounded-lg focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500 focus:border-blue-500">'

Description: Use Tailwind's text scale for consistent typography
Do: Apply text-sm, text-base, text-lg etc for font sizes
Don't: Don't use arbitrary pixel values for font sizes

Description: Use Tailwind's spacing scale consistently
Do: Apply p-{}, m-{}, gap-{} from the spacing scale
Don't: Don't use arbitrary pixel values for spacing

Description: Use Tailwind's color palette consistently
Do: Apply bg-{color}, text-{color}, border-{color}
Don't: Don't use hex values directly when Tailwind colors exist

Description: Use consistent icon library (Lucide, Heroicons)
Do: Import specific icons, size with w-{} h-{}
Don't: Don't mix icon libraries or use emoji as icons

Description: Configure content paths for tree-shaking
Do: Include all template files in content config
Don't: Don't forget to include dynamic class names
